heading: Stay or vacation of execution of judgments, attachments, and garnishments
label: 3934 Stay or vacation of execution of judgments, attachments, and garnishments
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 524 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

Prior ProvisionsA prior section 204 of , art. II, , related to duration and term of stays and codefendants not in service, prior to the general amendment of this Act by . See .act Oct. 17, 1940, ch. 88854 Stat. 1181Pub. L. 108–189section 3935 of this title
Effective DateSection applicable to any case not final before , see , set out as a note under .Dec. 19, 2003section 3 of Pub. L. 108–189section 3901 of this title
amendments: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 204 of , art. II, , related to duration and term of stays and codefendants not in service, prior to the general amendment of this Act by . See .act Oct. 17, 1940, ch. 88854 Stat. 1181Pub. L. 108–189section 3935 of this title

children.heading: Court action upon material affect determination
children.label: a Court action upon material affect determination

children.text: stay the execution of any judgment or order entered against the servicemember; and
vacate or stay an attachment or garnishment of property, money, or debts in the possession of the servicemember or a third party, whether before or after judgment.

children.heading: Applicability
children.label: b Applicability
children.text: This section applies to an action or proceeding commenced in a court against a servicemember before or during the period of the servicemember’s military service or within 90 days after such service terminates.
